message:
Add comprehensive TUI tests - coverage 39% → 77%

- Add tests for Init with different views (History, Patterns, RequestDetail)
- Add tests for View with all view types including nil cases
- Add navigation tests for all view transitions (esc, b, enter)
- Add forwardUpdate tests for message forwarding to views
- Add handleNavigation tests for navigateMsg handling
- Add callback setup tests (Dashboard, Detail, History, Patterns)
- Add approve/reject request command tests
- Add tests for non-navigation key handling

Internal/tui package coverage improved from 39.2% to 77.1%.
Total project coverage increased to 89.1%.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
